response.justification: Candidate has only ~7 months of professional C++ experience (National Instruments, 2014-2015) plus a bachelor thesis, falling far short of the 5-10 years of strong hands-on C++ on Windows required. There is no Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain experience, and no demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle work. Strengths are in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/GIS systems — a clear mismatch for this role.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development)
Excellent communication evidenced by workshops, talks, and teaching engagements
Broad polyglot experience including low-latency systems work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
concerns: C++ experience is minimal (~7 months at NI) and over a decade old; not on Windows-focused capital markets stacks
No Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain exposure
No evidence of SQL Server or Oracle experience; DB work is MongoDB/MySQL

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
